Product Description
This handy ruler is designed to fit into a desk sized organiser. It doubles as a page marker with a "TODAY" header.
200mm (8")
Metric and Imperial measurements
Pack includes 2 Rulers
Designed to fit most brands of 3, 6 & 7 ring desk organisers.
